chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. S–692 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection Nos.1 to 3 and reply as at A. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.09.2025 Mr. Sajid Hussain Shar, Advocate a/w the petitioner-mother and detenues / minor children. Rao Junaid Advocate a/w respondent No.5-father. Ms. Deeba Ali Jaffri, AAG Sindh. DSP Asif Munawar and PI Abdul Nabi of P.S. Kalakot. ------------------------------- Pursuant to the order passed by this Court on 04.09.2025, the detenues / minor children have been produced in Court and their custody is hereby handed over to the petitioner-mother. The father (respondent No.5) residing in Lahore is also present before this Court as well as his counsel. Both the counsel for respondent No.5 and the respondent No.5-father have no objection with regard to the custody of the minor children to be retained by the mother in Karachi. The learned AAG Sindh submits that the children are minors and suckling, therefore, the custody lies with the mother. Given the above, this petition has served its purpose. The parties are at liberty to settle the matter with regard to custody of the minor children under the Guardians and Wards Act. The petition is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Asif
